WeaponTraitDef.label: extended barrel
WeaponTraitDef.description: A carefully made extended barrel. It increases muzzle velocity, letting rounds fly farther and improving effective range.

WeaponTraitDef.label: shortened barrel
WeaponTraitDef.description: A shortened barrel. It lowers muzzle velocity and range, but the lighter weight and better balance make the weapon faster to aim.

WeaponTraitDef.label: tactical barrel
WeaponTraitDef.description: A redesigned barrel built for ergonomics and handling. Its lighter profile reduces weight and makes the weapon quicker to steady.
